text: Shree Vishwa Dhanvantari HOME ABOUT US AYURVEDA TREATMENTS GALLERY CONTACT Shree Vishwa Dhanvantari Ayurved Chikitsalaya Yoga and Panchakarma Center WELCOME TO DR PRATIK PATIL'S Now we are ISO 9001:2015 Certified ABOUT US || आयुर्वेदो अमृतानाम् || अनादिमत्ययं दिव्यं व्यापकं विश्वभेषजम | त्रिकालबाधित नित्यमायुर्वेदमुपास्महे || प्रदीपभूतं शास्त्रं हि दर्शनं विपुला मतिः | ताभ्यां भिषक् सुयुक्ताभ्यां चिकित्सन्नपराध्यति || A Science having neither a beginning nor an end, a divine all encompassing medical science promoting universal good, an eternal omniscient system "AYURVEDA" worth a lifetimes study. Shree Vishwa Dhanvantari Ayurved Chikitsalaya is a center where ethical, authentic & above all Pure Ayurveda, Yoga and Panchakarma treatments are available under one roof in the rapidly developing city of Nerul, Navi-Mumbai since its establishment i.e., since 2011. Ashtang Ayurveda: The Eight Branches of Traditional Healing Ashtang Ayurveda, often referred to as "Eight Limbs of Ayurveda," is a comprehensive framework that encompasses various aspects of traditional Indian medicine.
